coding_rationale: Avoidance-based; minimal cognitive mediation; reactive withdrawal from emotional contexts (consensus: coders initially coded B blind but revised to A after receiving Webb's construct definitions)
Stimulus-driven rumination; focus on emotional stimulus without reappraisal or integration (consensus: coders initially coded B blind but revised to A after receiving Webb's construct definitions)
Rule-based environmental control; sequential problem-solving without affective integration
Active redirection of attention away from affect; compartmentalization of emotional input
Direct suppression of emotional expression; compartmentalization strategy
Miscellaneous response control; rule-governed behavioral regulation
Integrative reframing; cognitive contextualization of emotional experience
Multi-perspective integration; relational understanding of others' emotional states
Broader cognitive change strategies requiring meaning-level integration
Non-judgmental engagement with emotional experience; integration rather than suppression
